headline: PROVE YOUR PROCESS IS IN CONTROL
subheading: Turn the annual PQR from a dusty binder into live, trend-driven process intelligence.
flux_prompt: An abstract clinical-luxury editorial background evoking pharmaceutical product quality review and statistical trending, set in a cool teal and cyan palette over deep navy with a single subtle fresh-green accent. Elegant flowing control-chart curves and trend lines arc across the frame, with delicate scattered data points, glowing capability-distribution bell curves and a faint upper-and-lower-control-limit band rendered as luminous translucent ribbons. A continuous looping feedback ribbon weaves through the composition as a metaphor for the quality system loop, intersecting softly out-of-focus glass vials and a stack of layered translucent document planes suggesting a dossier. Polished dark reflective surface below, smooth navy bokeh depth, soft directional rim lighting from the left, calm and authoritative premium mood, shallow depth of field, refined geometric data visualisation aesthetic. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
